assumptions: Solidity 0.5.x — no built-in overflow/underflow protection; SafeMath or manual checks required
Oracle prices may be stale or manipulated; staleness window is not enforced on-chain
Comptroller is the access-control gateway for market operations
Exchange rate increases monotonically under normal conditions (no negative interest)
Block number is used as the time unit for interest accrual
ERC-20 underlying tokens may have non-standard return values (no-revert-on-failure)
